creator: st.mz@bk.ru
text:
Running a virtual machine with physical disk attached to it results in panic: 
vm_page_dirty: page is invalid
Physical disk was created using
VBoxManage internalcommands createrawvmdk -filename physdrive.vmdk -rawdisk /dev/ada1

How-To-Repeat: Attach a physical drive to virtual machine, make it first in boot order
Start VM
